attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LIST_ID_SEQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.COST_BUD_ID_SEQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.NUM_OF_HRS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.HOURLY_RATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.JOB_ROLE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.NUM_OF_TRIPS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.TRIP_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.NUM_OF_NIGHT_AWAY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.NIGHT_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.NUM_OF_TRAVEL_HRS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.TRAVEL_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.PCOGS_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.HARDWARE_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LAB_FEE_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.RATE_BAND, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.PREF_PRICE_MARGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.APR_DISCOUNT_PRCNT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.PUBLISHED_LP, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.SOLD_AS_MARGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LP_MARGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.MARKUP_PRCNT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.TOTAL_SERVICE_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP,
 (
select LIST_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP
minus
select LIST_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP
) ACM
where 
 ACM.LIST_ID_SEQ = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.LIST_ID_SEQ and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_LP_SKU_MAP.REFRESH_DATETIME
